workflows.name: Daily Property Scraping
workflows.notes: Scrapes all configured sources. Adjust max_price and provinces in node parameters.

workflows.name: Facebook Marketplace Monitor
outputs: New FB listings stored in DB
workflows.notes: Requires Flask to implement /api/facebook/marketplace/scrape endpoint using Selenium or Playwright.

workflows.name: Facebook Group Monitor
workflows.notes: Update group IDs in 'Load Group List' node with real South African property group IDs.

workflows.name: Email Inbox Parser
workflows.notes: Forward property listing emails to listings@puraestate.co.za. Status set to 'pending_review'.

workflows.name: Webhook Listing Ingestion
workflows.notes: Webhook is always listening. Validates API key from x-api-key header.

workflows.name: Price Drop Alerts
workflows.notes: Requires price_history table populated by the DB trigger. Set min drop percentage (default 3%) in SQL query.

workflows.name: New Listing Notifications
workflows.notes: Matches listings from last 6 hours against saved search criteria.

workflows.name: Market Summary Report
workflows.notes: STAKEHOLDER_EMAILS env var controls who receives the report.

workflows.name: Agent Performance Alerts
outputs: Manager email for agents below threshold
workflows.notes: Thresholds: <10% conversion rate, >5 overdue follow-ups trigger manager alert.

workflows.name: CRM Sync (Pipedrive)
workflows.notes: Set Pipedrive pipeline_id and stage_id in the Create Deal node. Get custom field keys from Pipedrive API.

workflows.name: Google Sheets Sync
outputs: Google Sheet refreshed with latest 1000 properties
workflows.notes: Create Google Sheet with 'Properties' and 'Summary' tabs before activating.

workflows.name: Email Campaigns (Weekly Digest)
workflows.notes: Sends max 500 emails per run. Personalizes based on province_preference and budget.

workflows.name: Slack Daily Listings by Province
workflows.notes: Create Slack channels: #wc-listings, #gp-listings, #kzn-listings, etc. and invite bot.

workflows.name: Database Backup to S3
workflows.notes: Ensure pg_dump and aws CLI are installed on VPS. Set PGPASSWORD or use ~/.pgpass file.

workflows.name: Health Monitoring
workflows.notes: Alerts only after 2 consecutive failures in 20 min to prevent false positives. Customize service URLs.

workflows.name: Data Quality & Deduplication
workflows.notes: Marks duplicates as 'duplicate' status (not deleted). Stale = no update in 30 days.

workflows.name: Monthly Analytics Reports
workflows.trigger: Cron: 0 6 1 * * (1st of every month at 6:00 AM)
outputs: HTML analytics report emailed to STAKEHOLDER_EMAILS
workflows.notes: Covers: 12-month trends, province breakdown, property types, lead conversion.

workflows.name: Inquiry Form Processing
workflows.notes: Connect website inquiry form to this webhook. Automatically assigns to least-busy agent.

workflows.name: Lead Scoring Engine
workflows.notes: Scoring factors: budget (20pts), timeline (20pts), activity (30pts), intent (30pts). Requires tracking lead_interactions.

workflows.name: Follow-up Reminders
outputs: Personalized reminder digest emailed to each agent
workflows.notes: Hot leads: reminder after 1 day. Warm: 3 days. Cold: 7 days. Create manual reminders in follow_up_reminders table.
